ogTitle: Yowie Bay vs Yullundry: Climate Safety

heading: Yowie Bay vs Yullundry — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yowie Bay, New South Wales and Yullundry, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yullundry has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Yowie Bay (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yowie Bay or Yullundry safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yowie Bay has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Yullundry scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yowie Bay scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Yullundry scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yowie Bay or Yullundry?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yullundry has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
